titleStmt.title: SII 16.9: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 9. (A.R. No. 312 of 1922.) MUDIVĒḌU, MADANAPALLE TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock near a tank.
This is dated in the cyclic year, Īśvara, Āshāḍha, śu. 13, Sunday, the Śaka year being indifferently written. The details may be equated to 1397 A.D., July 8, Sunday.

It records gift of lands made to the Gods Tiruveṅgaḷanātha, Mallikārjuna, Bhairava and to the Brāhmaṇas Raṁganātha and [Rā]māvojhalu by Tippi-seṭṭi and Timāya, son and daughter respectively of Tippi-seṭṭi to whom the Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Mōṭṭa Dōrapa-nāyaka had given certain lands under the tank at Ballegānacheruvu in Maṅgumali-sthaḷa, in Penugoṇḍa-Mārjavāḍa which was under the administration of Mahāpradhāna Irugappa-daṇḍanāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu Ø85 Agunēṭi yīsvarasaṁva
tsara Āṣāḍha su 13 Ā śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁḍalēsvara harirāyavibhāḍa bhāsakutappuvarā
yaragaṁḍa pūrvvapaścimavuttaradakṣiṇacatusamudrādhipati Ayina śrīvīra harihararāyaḍu prithi
vi rājyamu sēyucunuṁḍaṁgānu Ā rājyapratipālakulayina śrīma(ṁ)nmahāprathāna yiru
gapadaṁḍanāyaṁkulakuṁ jelle penuṁgoṁḍa marujavāḍi lōna yī maṁgu
malistaḷāna ballegānaceṟavu yēlucuṁna śrīma(ṁ)nmahānāyaṁkācāryyu
layina mōṭṭa dōrapanāyaniṁgāru taṁḍḍri tippi seṭṭi koḍuku ti
ppiseṭṭiki kūṁtuṟu timāyakuṁnu ballegānaceṟuvu polamunanu
Udagirisikharaṁ dharāmaṁḍituṁḍayina śrītiruveṁgaḷanāṁthani
tirumuṭamulōnidini ceṟavugaṭṭanu yiccina paṭṭaparicārika
kradumu yeṭlaṁnanu ceṟuvukriṁdanu baṭamaḍi mākunu paṁdumu
Ā ceṟapukriṁdanu voḍḍukāluvaṁ gala Aṁtavaṭṭu maḍi puṭṭi Okkaṁṭiki
dasavaṁdamu kaṭṭu kodaṁgi nalutumu mariyādanu celliṁpuṁcuṁḍagā
nu tippi seṭṭiṁ danakūtuṟu tiṁmāyanu tippa�mudrā� tāmu
tama tallitaṁḍrulakuṁ puṇyamugānu tamakuṁ cellēṭi nālōpalanē du
ṁnē nēla dēvabrāhmanavrittulu peṭṭinavi śrī tiruveṁgaḷanāṁtani tiruvaḍiyāṁṭṭānaku pu
ṭṭeṁḍu mallikārjunadēvaraku puṭṭeṁḍu bhayiravadēvaraku Eṁdumu śrībhaṭṭarikamayi
na mukkoṁḍla śrīraṁganāṁtaniki paṁdumu śrīvāriparikaramayina sēṣamu ceṁnnayyaṁgāri
komāruḍu rāmavojyalaṁgāriki paṁdumu .
Digital edition of SII 16.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
